name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
In Stock!!️
Groove 16 Boston Mini bag, irresistibly cute. The simple bag shape is retro yet high-end. Crafted from classic blue oblique jacquard, it is exquisite yet full of fashion sense. It can be carried by hand or crossbody. It is lightweight and convenient to carry, and the capacity is quite sufficient for daily use.
size:17*10*8cm
